note: Implemented async cancellation and timeout support: (1) Added SetCanceled to SocketIoValueTaskSource for CancellationToken-aware completion, (2) Registered CancellationToken callbacks on SendAsync/ReceiveAsync with race-free dispose-before-complete pattern, (3) Added internal ConnectAsync(IPEndPoint, TimeSpan, CancellationToken) timeout overload with zero-timeout fast path and linked CTS, (4) Added 20 tests covering SetCanceled behavior, timeout overload edge cases, handle leak prevention on cancel, and cancel-then-succeed sequences. All 20 new tests pass; all existing async tests pass.
